forecasts.short: Slight Chance Snow Showers then Chance Rain Showers
forecasts.detailed: A slight chance of snow showers before 7am, then a chance of rain showers between 7am and 4pm. Cloudy, with a high near 46. South wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Scattered rain showers before 5pm. Cloudy, with a high near 45. South wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers before 9am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 50. South wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Rain Showers
forecasts.detailed: A chance of rain showers after noon. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 44. South wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Scattered rain showers before 1pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 51. South wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
forecasts.detailed: A chance of rain showers before 9am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 61. Southwest wind 3 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
